member.name: T:AttendanceSystem.Application.Services.AttendanceRulesService
member.summary: Core attendance rules engine for check-in, check-out, breaks, and overtime.

member.name: M:AttendanceSystem.Application.Services.AttendanceRulesService.EvaluateCheckIn(System.DateTime,AttendanceSystem.Domain.Entities.WorkSchedule,System.DateOnly)
member.summary: Evaluates check-in time against schedule and returns status and late minutes.

member.summary: Evaluates check-out against scheduled end time.

member.name: M:AttendanceSystem.Application.Services.AttendanceRulesService.CalculateBreakDuration(System.TimeSpan,AttendanceSystem.Domain.Entities.WorkSchedule)
member.summary: Calculates break duration per company policy based on work hours.

member.summary: Calculates overtime hours with optional multipliers.

member.summary: Haversine-based geofence calculations.
